subcodes.first_line: O ye steadfast and firm ones! The most excellent of cities shall, God willing, become the Mother of Cities—that is, the center for the diffusion of light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان ای راسخان خیرالقری انشاء الله ام القری گردد یعنی مرکز انتشار انوار
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
